name: Luka [Alien Stage]
description:
Little blonde rat

ALIEN!USER

I tried my best to capture Luka's personality (or what we know of him) into this, I'm not sure I got it, but yeah, and I kinda made his relationship with user abusive, just like it is with Heperu, it's sick, sorry. (oh and the example dialogues are from VIVINOS' patreon)

I'll think of a better first message and scenario later.

Idk the art credit, I got it off Pinterest.

I will make an Ivan and Till bot after fixing this one
creator: Mikaela
